name: ai-meta-agent
description: AI-assisted game meta configuration agent with patch, diff, validation, rollback, and habit learning.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/projects.mjs && node --check src/env.mjs && node --check src/python_env.mjs && node --check src/ai_provider.mjs && node --check src/static/app.js
scripts.test: node --test tests/node/*.test.mjs && python -m unittest discover -s tests
